text: Which of the following is closest in meaning to "SWIFT"?
explanation: Swift means moving with great speed; rapid is the closest synonym, both describing fast movement.
wrongReasons: Heavy refers to weight or burden, not speed.
Distant refers to being far away in space or time, unrelated to speed.
Narrow refers to width or limited scope, not pace.
hebrewExplanation: swift = מהיר. rapid = מהיר. טעויות נפוצות: heavy = כבד (לא קשור), distant = רחוק (לא קשור).

text: Which of the following is closest in meaning to "ANCIENT"?
explanation: Ancient means very old or from a long-ago era; archaic is the closest synonym, describing something very old or outdated.
wrongReasons: Modern means contemporary or recent — the opposite of ancient.
Fragile means easily broken or delicate, unrelated to age.
Simple means not complex, unrelated to historical age.
hebrewExplanation: ancient = עתיק. archaic = ארכאי, עתיק מאוד. טעויות נפוצות: modern = מודרני (ההפך), fragile = שביר (לא קשור).

text: Which of the following is closest in meaning to "BRAVE"?
explanation: Brave means showing courage in the face of danger; courageous is the closest synonym.
wrongReasons: Timid means lacking courage — the opposite of brave.
Gentle means kind and soft-mannered, not related to bravery.
Clever means intelligent or quick-witted, not related to courage.
hebrewExplanation: brave = אמיץ. courageous = אמיץ. טעויות נפוצות: timid = פחדן (ההפך), gentle = עדין (לא קשור).

text: Which of the following is closest in meaning to "WEALTHY"?
explanation: Wealthy means having a great deal of money or assets; affluent is the closest synonym.
wrongReasons: Poor means lacking money — the opposite of wealthy.
Healthy refers to physical well-being, not financial status.
Famous means well known, which is unrelated to wealth.
hebrewExplanation: wealthy = עשיר. affluent = אמיד, עשיר. טעויות נפוצות: poor = עני (ההפך), healthy = בריא (לא קשור).

text: Which of the following is closest in meaning to "FURIOUS"?
explanation: Furious means extremely angry; enraged is the closest synonym, both describing intense anger.
wrongReasons: Joyful means very happy — the opposite emotional state.
Calm means peaceful and untroubled — the opposite of furious.
Curious means eager to know or learn, an unrelated emotion.
hebrewExplanation: furious = זועם, מאוד כועס. enraged = מלא זעם. טעויות נפוצות: joyful = שמח (הפך), calm = רגוע (הפך).

text: Which of the following is closest in meaning to "IDENTICAL"?
explanation: Identical means exactly the same; alike is the closest synonym, meaning similar or the same.
wrongReasons: Different means not the same — the opposite of identical.
Unique means one of a kind, implying distinctness, not sameness.
Visible means able to be seen, unrelated to similarity.
hebrewExplanation: identical = זהה. alike = דומה, זהה. טעויות נפוצות: different = שונה (ההפך), unique = ייחודי (משמעות שונה).

text: Which of the following is closest in meaning to "CURIOUS"?
explanation: Curious means eager to know or learn something; inquisitive is the closest synonym, both describing a desire to investigate.
wrongReasons: Bored means lacking interest — the opposite of curious.
Nervous refers to anxiety or worry, not the desire to learn.
Tired refers to lack of energy, unrelated to curiosity.
hebrewExplanation: curious = סקרן. inquisitive = חוקרני, סקרן. טעויות נפוצות: bored = משועמם (ההפך), nervous = עצבני (לא קשור).

text: Which of the following is closest in meaning to "DIFFICULT"?
explanation: Difficult means requiring effort or skill; arduous is the closest synonym, meaning demanding and strenuous.
wrongReasons: Easy means requiring little effort — the opposite of difficult.
Lengthy refers to duration or length, not difficulty.
Quiet means making little noise, unrelated to difficulty.
hebrewExplanation: difficult = קשה. arduous = מאומץ, קשה מאוד. טעויות נפוצות: easy = קל (ההפך), lengthy = ארוך (לא קשור).

text: Which of the following is closest in meaning to "INEVITABLE"?
explanation: Inevitable means certain to happen and impossible to avoid; inescapable is the closest synonym.
wrongReasons: Uncertain means not known for sure — the opposite of inevitable.
Unlikely means probably not going to happen, contradicting inevitability.
Preventable means able to be stopped — directly opposite to inevitable.
hebrewExplanation: inevitable = בלתי נמנע. inescapable = בלתי נמנע, אין מנוס ממנו. טעויות נפוצות: uncertain = לא בטוח (ההפך), preventable = ניתן למניעה (ההפך).

text: Which of the following is closest in meaning to "CONCEAL"?
explanation: Conceal means to keep something hidden or secret; hide is the closest synonym.
wrongReasons: Reveal means to make known — the direct opposite of conceal.
Discuss means to talk about something openly, which is contrary to concealing.
Locate means to find the position of something, unrelated to hiding.
hebrewExplanation: conceal = להסתיר. hide = להסתיר. טעויות נפוצות: reveal = לחשוף (ההפך), discuss = לדון (לא קשור).

text: Which of the following is closest in meaning to "RELUCTANT"?
explanation: Reluctant means unwilling or not eager to do something; hesitant is the closest synonym, both suggesting resistance or uncertainty.
wrongReasons: Enthusiastic means very eager and excited — the opposite of reluctant.
Determined means firmly resolved, suggesting strong willingness, not reluctance.
Curious means eager to learn, which implies willingness rather than reluctance.
hebrewExplanation: reluctant = מהסס, לא מוכן. hesitant = מהסס. טעויות נפוצות: enthusiastic = נלהב (ההפך), determined = נחוש (ההפך).

text: Which of the following is closest in meaning to "DIMINISH"?
explanation: Diminish means to make or become smaller or less; lessen is the closest synonym.
wrongReasons: Expand means to increase in size or scope — the opposite of diminish.
Strengthen means to make stronger — the opposite of diminishing.
Replace means to substitute one thing for another, not to reduce it.
hebrewExplanation: diminish = להקטין, לצמצם. lessen = להפחית. טעויות נפוצות: expand = להרחיב (ההפך), strengthen = לחזק (ההפך).

text: Which of the following is closest in meaning to "PERSIST"?
explanation: Persist means to continue firmly in spite of difficulty; continue is the closest synonym.
wrongReasons: Abandon means to give up entirely — the opposite of persisting.
Begin means to start, not to keep going through difficulty.
Delay means to postpone, which contradicts persistent effort.
hebrewExplanation: persist = להתמיד, להמשיך. continue = להמשיך. טעויות נפוצות: abandon = לנטוש (ההפך), delay = לדחות (לא קשור).

text: Which of the following is closest in meaning to "BENEVOLENT"?
explanation: Benevolent means well-meaning and kindly; charitable is the closest synonym, both implying goodwill toward others.
wrongReasons: Hostile means unfriendly and aggressive — the opposite of benevolent.
Indifferent means having no particular interest or concern, lacking the warmth of benevolence.
Dominant means having power or control over others, unrelated to kindness.
hebrewExplanation: benevolent = נדיב, טוב לב. charitable = נדיב, אוהב אדם. טעויות נפוצות: hostile = עוין (ההפך), indifferent = אדיש (לא קשור).

text: Which of the following is closest in meaning to "TRANSPARENT"?
explanation: Transparent means allowing light to pass through or easy to understand; clear is the closest synonym in both the physical and figurative sense.
wrongReasons: Opaque means not transparent, blocking light — the opposite meaning.
Vivid means producing powerful mental images; it relates to brightness, not clarity of transparency.
Rigid means stiff and inflexible, referring to physical structure, not clarity.
hebrewExplanation: transparent = שקוף, ברור. clear = ברור, שקוף. טעויות נפוצות: opaque = אטום (ההפך), vivid = חי, צבעוני (לא קשור).

text: Which of the following is closest in meaning to "HINDER"?
explanation: Hinder means to make it difficult to do something or slow progress; obstruct is the closest synonym.
wrongReasons: Assist means to help — the opposite of hindering.
Observe means to watch carefully, unrelated to blocking progress.
Promote means to support and encourage — the opposite of hindering.
hebrewExplanation: hinder = לעכב, למנוע. obstruct = לחסום, לעכב. טעויות נפוצות: assist = לסייע (ההפך), promote = לקדם (ההפך).

text: Which of the following is closest in meaning to "CONFORM"?
explanation: Conform means to act in accordance with rules or standards; comply is the closest synonym.
wrongReasons: Rebel means to resist or refuse to follow rules — the opposite of conforming.
Innovate means to introduce new ideas, often departing from norms, not following them.
Ignore means to pay no attention to, which is the opposite of complying.
hebrewExplanation: conform = להתאים, לציית. comply = לציית, לעמוד בדרישות. טעויות נפוצות: rebel = למרוד (ההפך), innovate = לחדש (לא קשור).

text: Which of the following is closest in meaning to "METICULOUS"?
explanation: Meticulous means showing great attention to detail and being very careful; thorough is the closest synonym.
wrongReasons: Careless means not giving enough attention — the opposite of meticulous.
Hasty means done too quickly with insufficient care — the opposite quality.
Vague means not clearly expressed, lacking the precision of meticulous work.
hebrewExplanation: meticulous = קפדני, מדוקדק. thorough = יסודי, מדוקדק. טעויות נפוצות: careless = רשלני (ההפך), hasty = חפוז (ההפך).

text: Which of the following is closest in meaning to "FLOURISH"?
explanation: Flourish means to grow or develop in a healthy and vigorous way; thrive is the closest synonym.
wrongReasons: Decline means to decrease or deteriorate — the opposite of flourishing.
Struggle means to make great efforts against difficulties, implying hardship rather than success.
Remain means to stay in place, not implying growth or prosperity.
hebrewExplanation: flourish = לשגשג, לפרוח. thrive = לשגשג. טעויות נפוצות: decline = לדעוך (ההפך), struggle = להתמודד בקושי (ההפך).

text: Which of the following is closest in meaning to "AMBIGUOUS"?
explanation: Ambiguous means open to more than one interpretation; vague is the closest synonym, both describing a lack of clarity.
wrongReasons: Certain means sure and definite — the opposite of ambiguous.
Specific means precise and clearly defined — the opposite quality.
Logical means based on clear reasoning, which implies clarity, not ambiguity.
hebrewExplanation: ambiguous = דו-משמעי, מעורפל. vague = מעורפל, לא ברור. טעויות נפוצות: certain = בטוח (ההפך), specific = ספציפי (ההפך).

text: Which of the following is closest in meaning to "TEDIOUS"?
explanation: Tedious means too long, slow, or dull; monotonous is the closest synonym, both implying boring repetitiveness.
wrongReasons: Exciting means arousing enthusiasm — the opposite of tedious.
Brief means lasting only a short time; tedious things are notably not brief.
Refreshing means pleasantly new or different — the opposite of tedious.
hebrewExplanation: tedious = משעמם, מייגע. monotonous = אחיד ומשעמם. טעויות נפוצות: exciting = מרגש (ההפך), refreshing = מרענן (ההפך).

text: Which of the following is closest in meaning to "ASSERT"?
explanation: Assert means to state or declare something confidently; declare is the closest synonym.
wrongReasons: Deny means to refuse to acknowledge something — the opposite of asserting.
Question means to express doubt, which is the opposite of making a firm assertion.
Retreat means to withdraw from a position, implying the opposite of assertiveness.
hebrewExplanation: assert = לטעון, להצהיר. declare = להצהיר. טעויות נפוצות: deny = להכחיש (ההפך), question = לפקפק (ההפך).

text: Which of the following is closest in meaning to "PLAUSIBLE"?
explanation: Plausible means seeming reasonable or probable; credible is the closest synonym, both suggesting something believable.
wrongReasons: Impossible means not able to happen — the opposite of plausible.
Trivial means of little importance, unrelated to believability.
Harmful means causing damage, which is unrelated to plausibility.
hebrewExplanation: plausible = סביר, אמין. credible = אמין, מהימן. טעויות נפוצות: impossible = בלתי אפשרי (ההפך), trivial = טריוויאלי (לא קשור).

text: Which of the following is closest in meaning to "DEPICT"?
explanation: Depict means to represent by a drawing, painting, or other description; portray is the closest synonym.
wrongReasons: Erase means to remove completely — the opposite of representing something.
Deny means to refuse to admit something, unrelated to depicting.
Conceal means to hide, which is the opposite of depicting or showing.
hebrewExplanation: depict = לתאר, לצייר. portray = לתאר, לגלם. טעויות נפוצות: erase = למחוק (ההפך), conceal = להסתיר (ההפך).

text: Which of the following is closest in meaning to "ELOQUENT"?
explanation: Eloquent means fluent and persuasive in speaking or writing; articulate is the closest synonym, both describing effective verbal expression.
wrongReasons: Silent means not making any sound — the opposite of eloquent speech.
Confused means unable to think clearly, incompatible with eloquence.
Hostile means aggressive or unfriendly, referring to attitude rather than communication skill.
hebrewExplanation: eloquent = רהוט, בעל כושר ביטוי. articulate = רהוט, מבטא היטב. טעויות נפוצות: silent = שקט (ההפך), confused = מבולבל (לא קשור).

text: Which of the following is closest in meaning to "PRONE"?
explanation: Prone means likely to behave in a particular way or to be affected by something; inclined is the closest synonym.
wrongReasons: Resistant means opposed to something, the opposite of being prone to it.
Opposed means against something — contradicting the meaning of prone.
Surprised means feeling astonishment, unrelated to a tendency or inclination.
hebrewExplanation: prone = נוטה ל-, מועד ל-. inclined = נוטה, מוכן. טעויות נפוצות: resistant = עמיד, מתנגד (ההפך), opposed = מתנגד (ההפך).

text: Which of the following is closest in meaning to "SUBSEQUENT"?
explanation: Subsequent means coming after or following; following is the closest synonym.
wrongReasons: Previous means coming before — the direct opposite of subsequent.
Simultaneous means happening at the same time, not after.
Distant means far away in space or time, not specifically referring to order.
hebrewExplanation: subsequent = לאחר מכן, הבא. following = הבא, הבא בתור. טעויות נפוצות: previous = קודם (ההפך), simultaneous = בו זמנית (לא קשור).

text: Which of the following is closest in meaning to "CENSURE"?
explanation: Censure means to formally and severely criticize; criticize is the closest synonym.
wrongReasons: Praise means to express warm approval — the opposite of censure.
Ignore means to pay no attention, which is different from formally criticizing.
Reward means to give something in recognition of effort — the opposite in spirit.
hebrewExplanation: censure = לגנות, לבקר חריפות. criticize = לבקר. טעויות נפוצות: praise = לשבח (ההפך), reward = לתגמל (ההפך).

text: Which of the following is closest in meaning to "ALLEVIATE"?
explanation: Alleviate means to make something unpleasant less severe; relieve is the closest synonym.
wrongReasons: Worsen means to make something more severe — the direct opposite of alleviate.
Cause means to bring about, not to lessen an existing problem.
Ignore means to pay no attention, which does not reduce the problem.
hebrewExplanation: alleviate = להקל, לרכך. relieve = להקל. טעויות נפוצות: worsen = להחמיר (ההפך), cause = לגרום (לא קשור).

text: Which of the following is closest in meaning to "IMPARTIAL"?
explanation: Impartial means treating all rivals or disputants equally; neutral is the closest synonym, both describing freedom from favoritism.
wrongReasons: Biased means unfairly prejudiced — the opposite of impartial.
Passionate means having strong feelings, which may introduce bias rather than impartiality.
Selective means choosing carefully from a range, not related to fairness.
hebrewExplanation: impartial = אובייקטיבי, ניטרלי. neutral = ניטרלי, לא מוטה. טעויות נפוצות: biased = מוטה (ההפך), passionate = נלהב (לא קשור).

text: Which of the following is closest in meaning to "ABOLISH"?
explanation: Abolish means to formally put an end to something; eliminate is the closest synonym.
wrongReasons: Establish means to set up or create — the opposite of abolishing.
Reform means to improve by changing, not to completely end something.
Preserve means to maintain in its original state — the opposite of abolishing.
hebrewExplanation: abolish = לבטל, לשים קץ ל-. eliminate = לבטל, להסיר. טעויות נפוצות: establish = להקים (ההפך), preserve = לשמר (ההפך).

text: Which of the following is closest in meaning to "NOVEL"?
explanation: Novel (as an adjective) means new and original; original is the closest synonym.
wrongReasons: Familiar means well known, the opposite of novel.
Ancient means very old — the opposite of new or novel.
Complex means complicated, unrelated to newness or originality.
hebrewExplanation: novel (תואר) = חדשני, מקורי. original = מקורי, ייחודי. טעויות נפוצות: familiar = מוכר (ההפך), ancient = עתיק (ההפך).

text: Which of the following is closest in meaning to "AGGRAVATE"?
explanation: Aggravate means to make a problem or situation worse; exacerbate is the closest synonym.
wrongReasons: Soothe means to calm or relieve — the opposite of aggravating.
Resolve means to find a solution — the opposite of worsening a situation.
Prevent means to stop something from happening, not to worsen it.
hebrewExplanation: aggravate = להחמיר, לגרות. exacerbate = להחמיר. טעויות נפוצות: soothe = להרגיע (ההפך), resolve = לפתור (ההפך).

text: Which of the following is closest in meaning to "COMPEL"?
explanation: Compel means to force or oblige someone to do something; force is the closest synonym.
wrongReasons: Suggest means to propose an idea, leaving the choice open — much weaker than compel.
Permit means to allow, implying freedom of choice — the opposite of compelling.
Discourage means to try to prevent by persuasion — the opposite direction of compelling.
hebrewExplanation: compel = לכפות, להכריח. force = לכפות. טעויות נפוצות: suggest = להציע (חלש מדי), permit = להתיר (ההפך).

text: Which of the following is closest in meaning to "TACITURN"?
explanation: Taciturn means tending to be quiet and not speaking frequently; reserved is the closest synonym, both describing someone who does not readily share thoughts.
wrongReasons: Garrulous means excessively talkative — the direct opposite of taciturn.
Candid means open and honest in expression, implying willingness to speak, not silence.
Assertive means confident in stating opinions, implying active verbal expression — the opposite.
hebrewExplanation: taciturn = שתקן, לקוני. reserved = שמור, לא פתוח. טעויות נפוצות: garrulous = פטפטן (ההפך), candid = גלוי לב (לא קשור).

text: Which of the following is closest in meaning to "INSIDIOUS"?
explanation: Insidious means proceeding in a gradual and subtle way but with harmful effect; treacherous is the closest synonym, both implying hidden danger.
wrongReasons: Obvious means easy to perceive — insidious threats are notably hidden, not obvious.
Harmless means causing no damage — the opposite of the harmful nature of insidious things.
Beneficial means resulting in good — the opposite of the damaging nature of insidious processes.
hebrewExplanation: insidious = מזיק בצורה סמויה, ערמומי. treacherous = בוגדני, מסוכן. טעויות נפוצות: obvious = ברור (ההפך), harmless = חסר נזק (ההפך).

text: Which of the following is closest in meaning to "RECALCITRANT"?
explanation: Recalcitrant means stubbornly resistant to authority or control; defiant is the closest synonym.
wrongReasons: Obedient means readily complying with authority — the opposite of recalcitrant.
Cooperative means willing to work with others — the opposite of resistance.
Modest means not boasting or overestimating one's abilities, unrelated to compliance.
hebrewExplanation: recalcitrant = סרבן, עקשן שמסרב לציית. defiant = מתנגד, מורד. טעויות נפוצות: obedient = ציתני (ההפך), cooperative = שיתופי (ההפך).

text: Which of the following is closest in meaning to "OBFUSCATE"?
explanation: Obfuscate means to make something unclear or difficult to understand; confuse is the closest synonym.
wrongReasons: Clarify means to make something clearer — the direct opposite of obfuscate.
Simplify means to make something easier to understand — the opposite of obfuscating.
Reveal means to make known something hidden — the opposite of obscuring.
hebrewExplanation: obfuscate = לערפל, לבלבל בכוונה. confuse = לבלבל. טעויות נפוצות: clarify = להבהיר (ההפך), simplify = לפשט (ההפך).

text: Which of the following is closest in meaning to "TREPIDATION"?
explanation: Trepidation means a feeling of fear or agitation about something uncertain; apprehension is the closest synonym.
wrongReasons: Confidence means a feeling of self-assurance — the opposite of trepidation.
Excitement may overlap slightly but refers to positive anticipation, not fear or anxiety.
Contentment means a state of happiness and satisfaction — the opposite emotional state.
hebrewExplanation: trepidation = חרדה, פחד. apprehension = חשש, דאגה. טעויות נפוצות: confidence = ביטחון עצמי (ההפך), contentment = שביעות רצון (ההפך).

text: Which of the following is closest in meaning to "SYCOPHANTIC"?
explanation: Sycophantic means excessively complimentary to gain favor; flattering is the closest synonym, both involving excessive or insincere praise.
wrongReasons: Critical means expressing disapproval — the opposite of fawning praise.
Sincere means genuine and honest — sycophantic behavior is notably insincere.
Hostile means unfriendly or aggressive — the opposite of fawning behavior.
hebrewExplanation: sycophantic = חנפני, מחמיא בצורה אינטרסנטית. flattering = מחמיא, מפייס. טעויות נפוצות: critical = ביקורתי (ההפך), sincere = כן (ההפך).

text: Which of the following is closest in meaning to "PERFIDIOUS"?
explanation: Perfidious means deceitful and untrustworthy; treacherous is the closest synonym, both implying betrayal.
wrongReasons: Loyal means faithful and devoted — the direct opposite of perfidious.
Cautious means careful to avoid danger, unrelated to betrayal or deceit.
Indifferent means having no particular interest, unrelated to trustworthiness.
hebrewExplanation: perfidious = בוגדני, נכלולי. treacherous = בוגדני. טעויות נפוצות: loyal = נאמן (ההפך), cautious = זהיר (לא קשור).

text: Which of the following is closest in meaning to "LOQUACIOUS"?
explanation: Loquacious means very talkative; garrulous is the closest synonym, both describing someone who talks excessively.
wrongReasons: Taciturn means habitually quiet — the direct opposite of loquacious.
Eloquent means speaking expressively and persuasively, but does not imply excessive talking.
Reserved means slow to reveal emotions or opinions — the opposite of loquacious.
hebrewExplanation: loquacious = פטפטן, דברן. garrulous = פטפטן. טעויות נפוצות: taciturn = שתקן (ההפך), reserved = שמור (ההפך).

text: Which of the following is closest in meaning to "INVETERATE"?
explanation: Inveterate means having a habit or interest that is well established and unlikely to change; habitual is the closest synonym.
wrongReasons: Occasional means happening at irregular and infrequent intervals — the opposite of inveterate.
Temporary means lasting only a short time — the opposite of the entrenched nature of inveterate behavior.
Reformed means changed for the better, implying the habit has been dropped — the opposite.
hebrewExplanation: inveterate = מושרש, כרוני. habitual = רגיל, שגרתי, כרוני. טעויות נפוצות: occasional = מזדמן (ההפך), temporary = זמני (ההפך).

text: Which of the following is closest in meaning to "VACILLATE"?
explanation: Vacillate means to waver between different opinions or actions; waver is the closest synonym.
wrongReasons: Decide means to make a firm choice — the opposite of vacillating.
Commit means to pledge or dedicate firmly — the opposite of wavering.
Progress means to move forward, implying direction and purpose, unlike vacillating.
hebrewExplanation: vacillate = להתלבט, להתנדנד בין אפשרויות. waver = להסס, להתנדנד. טעויות נפוצות: decide = להחליט (ההפך), commit = להתחייב (ההפך).

text: Which of the following is closest in meaning to "NEFARIOUS"?
explanation: Nefarious means wicked or criminal; villainous is the closest synonym, both describing deep moral wrongdoing.
wrongReasons: Virtuous means having high moral standards — the direct opposite of nefarious.
Obscure means not well known or unclear, unrelated to moral wickedness.
Reckless means acting without thinking of consequences; it lacks the deliberate evil implied by nefarious.
hebrewExplanation: nefarious = רשע, נלוז. villainous = נבלי, רשע. טעויות נפוצות: virtuous = מוסרי (ההפך), obscure = אפל/לא ידוע (לא קשור).

text: Which of the following is closest in meaning to "EPHEMERAL"?
explanation: Ephemeral means lasting for a very short time; transient is the closest synonym.
wrongReasons: Permanent means lasting forever — the direct opposite of ephemeral.
Vivid means producing powerful images or impressions, unrelated to duration.
Recurring means happening repeatedly over time — the opposite of something fleeting.
hebrewExplanation: ephemeral = חולף, קצר מועד. transient = חולף, זמני. טעויות נפוצות: permanent = קבוע (ההפך), recurring = חוזר (ההפך).

text: Which of the following is closest in meaning to "LACONIC"?
explanation: Laconic means using very few words; concise is the closest synonym, both describing brief and to-the-point expression.
wrongReasons: Verbose means using more words than needed — the direct opposite of laconic.
Eloquent means fluent and persuasive in speech, but does not specifically imply brevity.
Ambiguous means unclear or open to interpretation, unrelated to the length of expression.
hebrewExplanation: laconic = לקוני, תמציתי. concise = תמציתי, ממוקד. טעויות נפוצות: verbose = מילולי (ההפך), ambiguous = דו-משמעי (לא קשור).

text: Which of the following is closest in meaning to "PERNICIOUS"?
explanation: Pernicious means having a harmful effect, especially in a gradual or subtle way; harmful is the closest synonym.
wrongReasons: Beneficial means resulting in good — the direct opposite of pernicious.
Neutral means having no strong effect in either direction — the opposite of pernicious's strong negative impact.
Temporary means lasting only a short time; pernicious effects are often lasting, not temporary.
hebrewExplanation: pernicious = מזיק, הרסני. harmful = מזיק. טעויות נפוצות: beneficial = מועיל (ההפך), neutral = ניטרלי (ההפך).

text: Which of the following is closest in meaning to "VENERATE"?
explanation: Venerate means to regard with great respect; revere is the closest synonym, both indicating deep admiration.
wrongReasons: Despise means to feel contempt for — the direct opposite of venerating.
Tolerate means to allow or accept something without liking it, far weaker than venerate.
Criticize means to express disapproval — the opposite of showing deep respect.
hebrewExplanation: venerate = לכבד מאוד, להעריץ. revere = לכבד, להעריץ. טעויות נפוצות: despise = לבוז (ההפך), tolerate = לסבול (חלש מדי).

text: Which of the following is closest in meaning to "INTRANSIGENT"?
explanation: Intransigent means refusing to change one's views or to agree; unyielding is the closest synonym, both describing an unwillingness to compromise.
wrongReasons: Flexible means willing to change and adapt — the direct opposite of intransigent.
Cooperative means willing to work with others and compromise — the opposite quality.
Indecisive means not able to make decisions quickly, which is different from stubbornly refusing to change.
hebrewExplanation: intransigent = נוקשה, לא מוכן לפשרה. unyielding = בלתי מתפשר, נוקשה. טעויות נפוצות: flexible = גמיש (ההפך), cooperative = שיתופי (ההפך).
